data.body: Live triage evidence (rebar-debug, with the merged fix on origin/main). Ran `rebar bridge-fsck` against the real store: ALL actionable/alerting drift classes are now EMPTY — would_terminal=0, local_gone=0, retired_overlap=0, dangling=0, unbound_jira=0. The 176 previously-false 'dangling' entries are now correctly in the non-alerting informational bucket absent_in_window_unprobed=176 (alive Done issues aged out of the windowed snapshot; per ADR 0028 §1 absence != deletion). Triage result: NO actionable drift to remediate; the 176 are working-as-designed. The literal AC 'empty binding_drift section' was proven unsatisfiable under the OLD conflation (window-absence counted as dangling grows unbounded); with the fix the ALERTING binding_drift is empty and only the informational bucket is populated.
